title: Istiry Mustardy Mustard Greens
description: A creamy, monsoon-inspired dish featuring rice wine and mustard greens in a gluten-free-friendly tandoor-clay-pot. Perfect for a warm evening meal.
instructions: Heat the tandoor-clay-pot over medium heat.
Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds to the pot. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until aromatic.
Add garlic and onion slices to the pot. Cook for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Pour in rice wine, coconut milk, and add salt. Stir well.
Place mustard greens on top of the mixture and cover with a sheet of parchment paper. Place the pot in a bain-marie over simmering water (20-30°C temperature difference).
Cook for 25 minutes, ensuring the greens are tender but not mushy. Check occasionally to prevent scorching.
Gently fold the mustard greens into the rice wine and onion mixture using tongs or a spoon.
Serve immediately with a side of rice or naan bread.
